summary: ClearTokens() zeroes every toml:-tagged auth-bearing field (AmazonCookies, AuthHeaderVal, AccessToken) before save().
reason: AuthHeader() checks AuthHeaderVal, AmazonCookies, and AccessToken in priority order; any one left non-empty keeps the CLI authenticated, and toml.Marshal re-serializes every toml:-tagged field. Without clearing all three, `auth logout` while AMAZON_COOKIES is set (or an auth_header is configured on disk) silently persists the live session to ~/.config/amazon-orders-pp-cli/config.toml.
